title: Update phone number to +91 9917417861 across entire website

requirements.text: Update all phone number references across the entire frontend to +91 9917417861. Replace every occurrence of the old number (+91 96904 17361 / +919690417361) with the new number. Specifically update: (1) Navigation.tsx — phone display and any tel: link; (2) Hero.tsx — Call Now CTA button to tel:+919917417861 and WhatsApp CTA button to https://wa.me/919917417861; (3) FloatingActionButtons.tsx — Call button href to tel:+919917417861 and WhatsApp button href to https://wa.me/919917417861; (4) BookingContact.tsx — displayed phone info and the post-submission WhatsApp CTA link to https://wa.me/919917417861; (5) Footer.tsx — phone number display and any tel:/WhatsApp links; (6) MapSection.tsx — contact phone display. Ensure no trace of the old number remains anywhere in the codebase.

quotes: update the phone number to +91 9917417861 everywhere on the website
Make sure the old number is completely removed and only the new number is used for Call, WhatsApp, Booking form, Contact section, and Footer
Also ensure WhatsApp chat opens correctly with this new number

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation bar displays +91 9917417861 and any tel: link uses tel:+919917417861
Hero section Call Now button uses tel:+919917417861
Hero section WhatsApp button uses https://wa.me/919917417861
FloatingActionButtons Call button href is tel:+919917417861
FloatingActionButtons WhatsApp button href is https://wa.me/919917417861
BookingContact section displays +91 9917417861 and post-submission WhatsApp CTA opens https://wa.me/919917417861
Footer displays +91 9917417861 and any WhatsApp/call link uses the new number
No instance of the old number (96904 17361 / 919690417361) exists anywhere in the frontend source files
Tapping the WhatsApp button opens a WhatsApp chat with the correct new number

constraints: Do not change any Instagram links or other contact details
Do not modify any immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Do not alter backend logic, data models, or any existing backend functionality
Do not change any visual styling, layout, or component structure — only update phone number strings and href values
nonGoals: Modifying the backend schema or Motoko code
Altering the visual design or layout of any component
